visual: Arrays with Pictures (dot mode): 3×5 dot array displayed centrally, neutral emphasis.
guide: "Let's figure out whether those two expressions really do always give the same product. Watch how I test this idea."
visual_2: System applies row emphasis (3 horizontal bands highlighted sequentially).
guide_2: "I see the rows. 3 rows of 5. That's 3 × 5. And 3 times 5 is 15."
visual_3: Row emphasis clears. System applies column emphasis (5 vertical bands highlighted sequentially).
guide_3: "Now the columns. 5 columns of 3. That's 5 × 3. And 5 times 3 is... 15. Same product! Same array, same dots. I didn't add anything or take anything away. Just read it a different way."
